description: Premakumara Rajapakse and Others Vs Maharagama Urban Council and Others Premakumara Rajapakse and Others Vs Maharagama Urban Council and Others View More before Hon.Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Premakumara Rajapakse and Others Vs Maharagama Urban Council and Others Premakumara Rajapakse and Others Vs Maharagama Urban Council and Others View More
judgement_by: Hon.Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: An unlawful construction effected by the 8th Respondent was directed to be removed by the Local Authority on the complaints made by the Petitioners. However, the 8th Respondent did not comply; the Petitioners continued to complain even to higher authorities without any success. Finally, sought intervention of this Court, directing the Local Authority to take action against the 8th Respondent wrongdoer. The 8th Respondent took up the position that it is a private dispute and therefore, should go to the District Court to resolve the matter. Held – Local Authority is under a statutory duty entrusted to it; therefore, writ lies.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
